mapper.select: SELECT id, project_key, name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM management_app.projects ORDER BY id

INSERT INTO management_app.projects (project_key, name, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{projectKey}, #{name}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) RETURNING id, project_key, name, description, created_at, updated_at

UPDATE management_app.projects SET project_key = #{request.projectKey}, name = #{request.name}, description = #{request.description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} RETURNING id, project_key, name, description, created_at, updated_at
